name: export_to_docx
description: Convert approved Markdown PRD content into a Microsoft Word (.docx) file and save it locally.

filename.description: Output filename. It should end with .docx, for example PRD_Feature_Name.docx.

markdown_content.description: The complete PRD Markdown content to convert.

output_dir.description: Optional output directory. If omitted, the script uses the current working directory.
